query:
SELECT 
  m.competencyId,
  c.code AS competencyCode,
  c.nameEn AS competencyName,
  p2.nameEn AS programName,
  COUNT(m.id) AS ploCount,
  SUM(m.weight) AS totalWeight
FROM mappings m
JOIN competencies c ON m.competencyId = c.id
JOIN plos pl ON m.ploId = pl.id
JOIN programs p2 ON pl.programId = p2.id
GROUP BY m.competencyId, pl.programId, c.code, c.nameEn, p2.nameEn
HAVING SUM(m.weight) > 1.001
ORDER BY totalWeight DESC;

  COUNT(m.id) AS ploCount,
  SUM(m.weight) AS totalWeight
FROM mappings m
JOIN competencies c ON m.competencyId = c.id
JOIN plos pl ON m.ploId = pl.id
JOIN programs p2 ON pl.programId = p2.id
GROUP BY m.competencyId, pl.programId, c.code, c.nameEn, p2.nameEn
HAVING SUM(m.weight) > 1.001
ORDER BY totalWeight DESC;
